sub_pixel_system.notes: Puzzle game; sub-pixel precision not documented

special_mechanics.name: Column Fall Gravity
special_mechanics.description: Columns of three symbols fall from top of well to bottom under gravity. Fall rate increases as play progresses.

physics_values.resettlement_gravity: pile settles under gravity after column lands

special_mechanics.name: Magic Jewel
special_mechanics.description: Special multicolor jewel appears occasionally. Configuration determines effect: shrink opponent's play area, unshrink player's board, or destroy all jewels matching its color.

special_mechanics.name: Match Cascade
special_mechanics.description: When three or more symbols connect horizontally, vertically, or diagonally, they disappear. Resettlement may trigger chain reactions.

physics_values.cascade_mechanic: repeating cycles until no more matches

tier_notes: Tier 2: Puzzle game with documented gameplay mechanics but no specific physics parameters (velocities, acceleration values) in available sources. Movement is restricted to block manipulation (left/right positioning, symbol cycling) rather than character movement physics.
